text:
# 开发指南：添加新的 Capability

## 步骤概览

### 1. 创建 CapabilityProvider 实现
```kotlin
class MyCapabilityProvider : CapabilityProvider {
    override val id = "my-capability"
    override val name = "My Capability"
    override val supportedActions = listOf("action1", "action2")
    
    override suspend fun execute(action: StructuredAction): ActionResult {
        // 实现执行逻辑
    }
}
```

### 2. 注册到 Registry
```kotlin
class MobileClawApplication : Application() {
    override fun onCreate() {
        super.onCreate()
        CapabilityProviderRegistry.register(MyCapabilityProvider())
    }
}
```

### 3. 定义 StructuredActionType
```kotlin
enum class StructuredActionType {
    MY_ACTION {
        override val parameters = listOf("param1", "param2")
        override val riskLevel = RiskLevel.LOW
    }
}
```

### 4. 添加 Policy 规则
```kotlin
val myPolicyRule = PolicyRule(
    actionType = "MY_ACTION",
    requireApproval = false,
    auditEnabled = true
)
PolicyEngine.addRule(myPolicyRule)
```

### 5. 添加 UI 支持
- 创建 ActionPreview 组件
- 添加到 GovernanceCenter 显示
- 处理结果反馈

## 文件位置
- Provider: `app/src/main/java/com/mobileclaw/app/runtime/provider/`
- Action: `app/src/main/java/com/mobileclaw/app/runtime/action/`
- Policy: `app/src/main/java/com/mobileclaw/app/runtime/policy/`
- UI: `app/src/main/java/com/mobileclaw/app/ui/`
